title: Breaking Out of the False World
description: On pages 7–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8, Unknown person #9, Nami, Giants as The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.
scene: The Straw Hats enter an unfamiliar Elbaf setting, encounter giant-scale mysteries, and begin separating the false world around them from the real island.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, usop!! Do you know anything about this place?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I remember US drinking on the Giants' ship...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Next thing I know, I'm here with you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Didn't he say it could cause hallucinations?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's a chance this is a hallucination right, Nami?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then... I might be seeing a cat monster, but...

summary: This part advances the Arrival in Elbaf through 23 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
